event: Entrance to the Holy Trinity Monastery in Vilno
description: A watercolor painting showing the entrance to a monastery through a large stone archway. Beyond the arch, white-walled buildings with red roofs are visible, including a small church or chapel with a green onion dome topped by a cross. A solitary figure stands in the courtyard. A lantern hangs from the arch. The scene is rendered in cool blues and warm whites and reds, with deep blue shadows under the arch creating a sense of passage from the outer world into the sacred enclosure. Cyrillic text appears at the bottom.

_meta.title: Vilno. Entrance to the Holy Trinity monastery.
